title: 现场枪响
Gunshot at the Scene
content: Zack和Emma赶到Webb会客室，Vivian握着手枪失神，Rosa坚持说自己看见Vivian开枪。
Zack and Emma reach Webb's reception room. Vivian stands dazed with a gun, while Rosa insists she saw Vivian fire.

title: 关键疑点
Key Doubt
content: 分析Vivian的手枪没有硝烟，23:30枪响和Rosa证词之间出现第一道矛盾。
Analysis shows Vivian's gun has no powder residue, creating the first contradiction between the 23:30 gunshot and Rosa's testimony.

title: 教学指证
Tutorial Expose
content: 指证Rosa时只能击出有限疑点，手头证据不足以直接推翻她的23:30叙事。
The expose against Rosa only opens a limited doubt. The current evidence is not enough to overturn her 23:30 story.

title: 72小时窗口
Seventy-Two Hours
content: Zack用Webb的委托协议换得72小时调查期，带着未解的时间线问题进入下一轮。
Zack uses Webb's commission agreement to win a 72-hour investigation window, carrying the unresolved timeline into the next loop.

title: Webb的隐忧
Webb's Fear
content: Webb提前留下委托，说明他预感自己会死；调查从蓝月亮真正的生意开始。
Webb's advance commission shows he expected his own death, so the investigation begins with the Blue Moon's real business.

title: 勒索照片
Blackmail Photos
content: 在歌舞厅小包厢发现勒索照片，证明Webb的生意远不止私酒。
Blackmail photos found in the cabaret booth prove Webb's business goes far beyond bootlegging.

title: 账本差额
Ledger Gap
content: 对比Webb办公室和Tommy办公室的账目，发现酒吧收入与公开说法严重不符。
Comparing Webb's and Tommy's ledgers reveals that the bar's income does not match the public story.

title: 指证Tommy
Expose Tommy
content: 用照片、账本和假古董交易击穿Tommy的说辞，确认Webb经营勒索网络，并指向一个未被点名的大人物。
Use the photos, ledgers, and fake antique trades to break Tommy's story, confirming Webb's extortion network and pointing toward an unnamed powerful figure.

title: 重回现场
Return to the Scene
content: Webb会客室重新开放，Zack调查窗户、侧巷和垃圾袋下的玻璃碎片。
Webb's reception room reopens, and Zack examines the window, side alley, and glass shards under the trash bags.

title: 死亡时间
Time of Death
content: 玻璃碎片和Rosa倒垃圾时间相互印证，说明真实枪击早于23:20。
The glass shards and Rosa's trash run support each other, showing the real shooting happened before 23:20.

title: Rosa的压力
Rosa's Pressure
content: 在Rosa储藏室找到威胁纸条和女儿医疗单，确认她被人逼迫作伪证。
The threat note and her daughter's medical bill in Rosa's storage room confirm she was forced into false testimony.

title: 第一个真相
First Truth
content: 指证Rosa后，23:30假枪声被击穿；Rosa交出现场捡到的弹壳，留下新的疑点。
After Rosa is exposed, the 23:30 gunshot collapses as a fake. Rosa gives Zack a casing from the scene, leaving a new mystery.

title: Vivian的沉默
Vivian's Silence
content: Rosa的谎言崩塌后，Vivian仍想认罪；Zack需要让她说出23:05真正发生了什么。
After Rosa's lie collapses, Vivian still wants to confess. Zack must get her to reveal what really happened at 23:05.

title: “鲸鱼”浮现
Whale Emerges
content: 被撕毁的合同和Tommy关于Rita的证词，说明“鲸鱼”已经把手伸进酒吧。
The torn contract and Tommy's testimony about Rita show that Whale has already reached into the bar.

title: 枪与口径
Gun and Caliber
content: Vivian的.25手枪与Rosa交出的.45弹壳不符，她不可能用那把枪杀死Webb。
Vivian's .25 pistol does not match Rosa's .45 casing, proving that gun could not have killed Webb.

title: 系统碾压
System Pressure
content: Vivian承认自己不是凶手，却仍被Morrison强押；调查方向转向真凶和保护伞。
Vivian admits she is not the killer, but Morrison still drags her away. The investigation turns toward the real killer and the cover-up.

title: 低谷开局
Low Point
content: Vivian被押走后，Zack和Emma意识到正常推理路径已经被Morrison截断。
After Vivian is taken, Zack and Emma realize the normal path of deduction has been cut off by Morrison.

title: James线索
James Clues
content: James的口头禅、Anna的处境、节目修改申请和完整节目单共同指向假枪声诡计。
James's phrasing, Anna's situation, the program change request, and the complete program point to the fake gunshot trick.

title: 现任执行人
Current Enforcer
content: James给“鲸鱼”的回信与Tommy证词闭合，说明James就是“鲸鱼”在酒吧里的现任执行人。
James's reply to Whale and Tommy's testimony close the loop, showing James is Whale's current enforcer inside the bar.

title: 真凶与代价
The Killer and the Cost
content: 指证James后，真实枪击、动机和胁迫Rosa的身份全部闭合，但James选择自杀。
After James is exposed, the real shooting, motive, and the person who threatened Rosa all close together, but James chooses suicide.

title: 清算方向
Path to the Cover-Up
content: 真凶已死，剩下的问题是Morrison为何压案，以及他替谁挡住真相。
The killer is dead. What remains is why Morrison buried the case and whom he is protecting.

title: Morrison家
Morrison's Home
content: 在Morrison家找到赌债欠条、向“鲸鱼”借款的记录，以及被他藏起的.45弹壳。
In Morrison's home, find his gambling debt, his loan record from Whale, and the .45 casing he hid.

title: 凶器闭合
Weapon Match
content: 米勒集团特制手枪与.45弹壳对上，Morrison看见弹壳变脸的原因浮出水面。
The Miller Arms pistol matches the .45 casing, revealing why Morrison changed when he saw it.

title: 最终指证
Final Expose
content: 在警局指证Morrison，证明他被“鲸鱼”的债务关系钉住，故意把Vivian推成替罪羊。
Expose Morrison at the police station, proving Whale trapped him through debt and that he tried to make Vivian the scapegoat.
